overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a player walking through a snowy industrial facility exterior and entering a high-tech server room. The player explores the interior while holding a pistol, examining control panels and server racks with blue ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy industrial alley between concrete buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through snowy industrial alleyway between concrete buildings, holding pistol

entered.detail: concrete industrial building with blue door marked 04 and warning signs
tall concrete wall with metal pipes running along the top
grey metal utility cabinets and electrical boxes
snow-covered asphalt ground with footprints and patches of ice
metal chain link fence blocking the far end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow snowy alley between industrial concrete buildings. The ground is covered in snow and ice, with a chain link fence visible at the far end. The building marked '04' is directly ahead with a blue door.

events.description: entering server room from snowy outdoor alley through blue metal door
stopping at wall-mounted control panel to examine the screens

agents.ego_description: entering the server room and approaching the wall-mounted control panel with glowing blue screens

entered.detail: blue metal door with 'SERVER ROOM' text on the frame
wall-mounted dual screen display showing data readouts and circular interfaces
tall server cabinets with blue LED lighting and glass doors
linear fluorescent ceiling lights with blue accent lighting
white dome security camera mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters the server room through a blue metal door, transitioning from the cold outdoor snow to a climate-controlled interior with blue ambient lighting. The player stops at a wall-mounted control panel with dual screens displaying technical data, while server racks line the corridor ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: server room interior with multiple equipment racks

events.description: resuming movement to explore deeper into the server room
tilting camera upward to examine ceiling pipes and upper server equipment

agents.ego_description: moving through the server room examining server racks, wall monitors, and eventually looking up at ceiling infrastructure

entered.detail: double server rack units against the back wall with blue LED lighting
large industrial ventilation pipes and cable conduits running along the ceiling
small rectangular window showing the outdoor snowy environment
articulated security camera mount with multiple joints and cables

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the server room, passing rows of illuminated server racks. The exploration continues toward the back wall where additional server units are visible. The player then looks upward to examine the industrial ceiling pipes and an articulated security camera arm, with a small window showing the snowy exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a frozen industrial exterior into the sterile, high-tech environment of a server room. It begins by navigating a narrow, snow-covered alley between concrete buildings, moving toward a blue door marked with the number 04. As the camera passes through this doorway, the cold outdoor landscape shifts abruptly into a climate-controlled interior bathed in blue ambient lighting, where the view pauses at a wall-mounted control panel with dual technical screens. The scene then expands as the camera moves deeper into the corridor, passing rows of illuminated server racks that lead toward the back of the facility. Finally, the perspective tilts upward to examine industrial ceiling pipes and an articulated security camera arm, catching a glimpse of the snowy exterior through a small window.
